promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch for bounded Axis4 harness/evidence-path reduction after the sims boundary and runner/result reductions.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest Axis4 polarity seam, scope gate, duplicate harness residue, and current evidence-path linkage.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until after the currently active sims sub-lineage was closed with one more bounded reduction pass.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless the current parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent Axis4 batch already isolates the core harness, evidence-path, and contradiction markers needed for this bounded reduction pass.

candidate_items.name: AXIS4_P03_DUAL_HARNESS_SINGLE_RESULT_NAMESPACE_PATTERN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest same-family duplication pattern in the parent batch without forcing a harness winner or implying sidecar equivalence.

candidate_items.name: AXIS4_POLARITY_ORDERING_EXECUTABLE_SEAM
candidate_items.why_candidate: Captures the parent batch's clearest executable-facing Axis4 seam in a smaller reusable packet.

candidate_items.name: TYPE1_ONLY_P03_SCOPE_GATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's strongest anti-overread boundary for the stored P03 family.

candidate_items.name: P03_RESULT_HASH_TO_TOPLEVEL_EVIDENCE_ALIGNMENT

candidate_items.name: POLARITY_SPECIFIC_SEQUENCE_SENSITIVITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Protects the parent batch's clearest branch-specific result from being flattened into a generic Axis4 sequence story.

quarantined_items.name: HARNESS_FILENAME_IDENTITY_DRIFT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent family contains a real filename-identity confusion that should stay explicit rather than being silently normalized.

quarantined_items.name: ALTERNATE_HARNESS_AUTHORITY_UNRESOLVED
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The current evidence pack supports one harness hash, but the parent batch does not justify killing or canonizing the alternate harness.

quarantined_items.name: SIDECAR_RECONCILIATION_UNRESOLVED
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch shows a real per-SIM versus packed sidecar split, but it does not reconcile the sidecar texts themselves.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest reusable Axis4 harness and evidence-path patterns from the parent batch.
They keep source lineage explicit while avoiding runtime work or a fresh raw-doc pass.
They preserve the parent batch's useful executable seam and evidence linkage without collapsing contradictions.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain unresolved identity, authority, or sidecar-scope problems rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong on Axis4 core lineage, but not sufficient to normalize the duplicate harness family.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Kept the pass bounded to the Axis4 P03 core batch rather than starting a fresh raw directional-suite family.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this Axis4 harness/evidence-path reduction pass.
